headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com; img-src 'self' data: https://images.unsplash.com; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-src https://www.google.com; form-action 'self' https://portal.metropolitancollege.ca; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
